context.projectOverview: Phase A Sprint 2: add a closed difficulty-tier enum on FleetChild + a TierProviderPolicy mapping each tier to a planner/generator/evaluator provider block, overlaid in buildChildConfig BEFORE the existing shallow-merge so output is byte-identical when tier is absent.

completedSprints.title: Grok/xAI provider wiring
completedSprints.summary: grok/grok-4/grok-4-fast shorthands -> openai-compat + https://api.x.ai/v1 (model-resolver.ts); isXaiEndpoint() + XAI_API_KEY arms in factory.ts. So the 'standard' tier block can use provider 'openai-compat' + endpoint 'https://api.x.ai/v1' + a grok model. Commit b739ef1.
